plan_review_notes: Approve the constraints/fitness slice: add read-only guard and scoring models over EvolutionHarnessPlan metrics, enforce hard guards for verify pass rate, conformance drift, unresolved warnings, MCP compatibility, and output contract stability, and keep scope out of candidate execution and MCP surface work.

plan_review_history.notes: Approve the constraints/fitness slice: add read-only guard and scoring models over EvolutionHarnessPlan metrics, enforce hard guards for verify pass rate, conformance drift, unresolved warnings, MCP compatibility, and output contract stability, and keep scope out of candidate execution and MCP surface work.

spec_review_notes: Freeze scope to guard/constraint evaluation and fitness scoring models only. The slice may consume existing run, dataset, and harness-plan data but must not execute candidates, mutate repository state, or expose MCP evolution tools/resources.

normal_cases.name: A candidate with stable verify rate, stable drift, bounded warning increase, and passing compatibility checks is accepted and receives a comparable fitness score.

edge_cases.name: Plan-only harness data without populated metrics remains in a pending guard/fitness state instead of fabricating results.
Warning thresholds allow controlled unresolved-warning increases without broadening the hard-guard scope.

exception_cases.name: Regressions in verify rate, drift, warnings, MCP compatibility, or output contract stability reject the candidate without mutating repository files.

verification_methods.target: Accepted candidate receives a comparable fitness score
Plan-only inputs remain pending and warning thresholds are respected
Hard-guard regressions reject without repo mutation
